title: WAMUL Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 10 Graduate, Diploma Apprentices Posts
description: The West Assam Milk Producers Co-operative Union Limited (WAMUL) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 10 Graduate Apprentices and Diploma Apprentices. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, Diploma in Electrical, Computer Science Engineering, and B.Sc. can apply for the WAMUL Notification 2026. The interested applicants can attend t...
